author: Sarah Nenni-Daher
title: Strawberry Shortcake Cupcakes
ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon of Neon Pink Food coloring gel
1/2 teaspoon of Neon Pink Food coloring gel

instructions_list: While your cupcakes cool, place the 1/2 package of Oreo cookies in a blender, and pulse until they turn into crumbs. Add the 1/2 package of Strawberry Jello, and blend until mixed. Place the cookie crumbs into a medium bowl, and stir in the Neon pink food coloring. Set aside.
Wash, dry and remove the stems of the strawberries. Leave on paper towels to dry.

When your cupcakes are completely cooled, place the strawberry frosting in a decorating bag with a large star tip, and frost the cupcakes in a big swirl ending at a point in the center of the cupcake.
Roll the sides of each of the frosted cupcakes in the cookie crumbs or use your fingers to drop pinches of cookie onto the sides of the cupcake frosting.
Place a strawberry in the center of each cupcake, and place one small dollop of frosting on the top then enjoy!
description: These yummy strawberry shortcake cupcakes are the best summer treat for a hot day and a lazy porch swing.
